topic: NLP-Based Automation of Systematic Literature Reviews in Computer Science
rqs: What is the precision of NLP-based automation tools for screening Computer Science literature compared to manual screening?
In which digital library or academic search engine contexts does NLP-based automation improve reproducibility of systematic literature reviews in Computer Science?
Which NLP-based automation techniques yield higher precision and reproducibility than traditional bibliometrics for Computer Science systematic reviews?
base_query: ("Computer Science Researchers") AND ("NLP Based Automation") AND ("Manual Screening" OR "Traditional Bibliometrics") AND ("Precision" OR "Reproducibility") AND ("Digital Libraries" OR "Academic Search Engines")
arxiv_query: (all:"Computer Science Researchers") AND (all:"NLP Based Automation") AND (all:"Manual Screening" OR all:"Traditional Bibliometrics") AND (all:"Precision" OR all:"Reproducibility") AND (all:"Digital Libraries" OR all:"Academic Search Engines")
